title: Valley of the Giant Skeleton
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his family trek to the Gobi Desert to find Uncle Wally's hidden treasure — and discover a giant dinosaur skeleton guarded by a sneaky old enemy! 🦖

q.en: What present did Trap bring Geronimo to cure his writer's block?
q.zh: 特拉普给杰罗尼摩带来了什么礼物，想治好他的写作瓶颈？

options.en: An old map wrapped around a giant bone
options.zh: 一张裹在一根巨大骨头上的古老地图
一个崭新的放大镜
一袋奶酪爆米花
一个会叫的猫形时钟

explain.en: Trap placed an old yellowed map wrapped around a gigantic bone on Geronimo's desk; he had found it inside Great-Great-Great-Uncle Wally's trunk.
explain.zh: 特拉普在杰罗尼摩的桌上放了一张发黄的古老地图，地图裹在一根巨大的骨头上。那是他在高高祖沃利叔叔的箱子里找到的。

q.en: Where does Geronimo's cousin Trap live?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的表哥特拉普住在哪里？

options.en: In an old train car called the Orient Express
options.zh: 在一节叫做东方快车的旧火车车厢里
在一辆奶酪色的房车里

options.en: In a house made of cheese
options.zh: 在一座用奶酪盖的房子里

options.en: In a Mongolian tent in the desert
options.zh: 在沙漠里的一顶蒙古包中

explain.en: Trap lives in an old train car called the Orient Express, which once belonged to their explorer ancestor Wandering Wally.
explain.zh: 特拉普住在一节叫做东方快车的旧火车车厢里，那原本属于他们那位探险家祖先流浪的沃利。

q.en: Who was Great-Great-Great-Uncle Wally, and what happened to his fur?
q.zh: 高高祖沃利叔叔是谁？他的毛发生了什么事？

options.en: An explorer whose fur was chewed off by a crocodile in the Amazon River
options.zh: 一位探险家，他在亚马逊河被鳄鱼咬掉了全身的毛

options.en: A lawyer for the Stilton Cheesemakers' Association
options.zh: 斯提尔顿奶酪制造商协会的律师

options.en: A famous paleontologist at the Mouseum of Natural History
options.zh: 自然历史老鼠博物馆的著名古生物学家
一位蒙古部落首领

explain.en: Uncle Wally was a 1800s explorer who roamed the world searching for treasure; Trap said a crocodile in the Amazon River chewed his fur to bits.
explain.zh: 沃利叔叔是十九世纪的探险家，周游世界寻找宝藏。特拉普说他在亚马逊河被鳄鱼把全身的毛都咬光了。

q.en: What is the capital city of Mongolia that the family flew to?
q.zh: 这家人乘飞机抵达的蒙古首都是哪座城市？

options.zh: 乌兰巴托
伊斯坦布尔
威尼斯
老鼠新城

explain.en: The family flew to Ulaanbaatar, the capital of Mongolia, before continuing on smaller planes, a bus, and camels.
explain.zh: 这家人先是飞到了蒙古的首都乌兰巴托，之后又换乘小飞机、公共汽车和骆驼继续前进。

q.en: The blonde rodent Geronimo met on the journey called herself Dr. von Fossilsnout. Who was she really?
q.zh: 旅途中杰罗尼摩遇到的那位金发老鼠自称是化石鼻博士。她究竟是谁？

options.en: The Shadow, a famous thief in disguise
options.zh: 影子，一个善于伪装的著名盗贼

options.en: The real Dr. Karina von Fossilsnout, a paleontologist
options.zh: 真正的卡琳娜·冯·化石鼻博士，一位古生物学家

options.en: Petunia Pretty Paws in a disguise
options.zh: 伪装起来的佩图尼亚·漂亮爪子
萨莉·拉特穆森本人

explain.en: The 'doctor' was actually the Shadow, Sally Ratmousen's cousin; she took off her tinted glasses and blonde wig to reveal her black jumpsuit.
explain.zh: 那位“博士”其实是影子，也就是萨莉·拉特穆森的表姐。她摘下有色眼镜、散开金发，露出了里面的黑色连身衣。

q.en: Who warned Geronimo that the guide Bondi Bobirat seemed suspicious?
q.zh: 是谁提醒杰罗尼摩，向导邦迪·波比拉特看起来很可疑？

options.zh: 他的侄子本杰明
他的妹妹西奥
他的表哥特拉普
佩图尼亚·漂亮爪子

explain.en: When Bobirat offered his jeep, Benjamin tugged Geronimo's sleeve and whispered that something seemed funny about that rat.
explain.zh: 当波比拉特主动提供吉普车时，本杰明拽了拽杰罗尼摩的袖子，悄悄说那只老鼠有点不对劲。

q.en: What kind of dinosaur skeleton did they find in the Valley of the Giant Skeletons?
q.zh: 他们在巨人骨架谷发现的恐龙骨架属于哪种恐龙？

options.en: A Tarbosaurus, a cousin of the Tyrannosaurus rex
options.zh: 特暴龙，一种和霸王龙相近的恐龙
剑龙
霸王龙
伶盗龙

explain.en: Geronimo called Petunia, who said the skeleton sounded like a Tarbosaurus, a dinosaur similar to a Tyrannosaurus rex found in the Gobi Desert.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩打电话给佩图尼亚，佩图尼亚说这副骨架听起来像是特暴龙——一种和霸王龙相似、生活在戈壁沙漠的恐龙。

q.en: What Mongolian legend did Helela tell the family by the stove?
q.zh: 赫莱拉在炉边给这家人讲了哪个蒙古传说？

options.en: A story about two horses and a wolf hidden in a sack
options.zh: 一个关于两匹马和一只藏在袋子里的狼的故事
一个关于成吉思汗的故事

options.en: A story about the Gobi bear
options.zh: 一个关于戈壁熊的故事
一个关于特暴龙的故事

explain.en: Helela told 'The Two Horses': a young horse opens a sack, a hungry wolf jumps out, and a clever rabbit tricks the wolf back inside.
explain.zh: 赫莱拉讲了“两匹马”的故事：小马打开一个袋子，一只饿狼跳出来，聪明的兔子把狼重新骗回袋子里。

q.en: How did the family finally find the way to the Valley of the Giant Skeletons after Bobirat abandoned them?
q.zh: 在波比拉特把他们抛弃后，这家人究竟是怎样找到巨人骨架谷的？

options.en: Benjamin drew the map from memory and their Mongolian friends guided them
options.zh: 本杰明凭记忆画出了地图，蒙古朋友为他们带路

options.en: Bondi Bobirat returned and drove them there
options.zh: 邦迪·波比拉特回来开车送他们

options.en: The Shadow gave the map back to them
options.zh: 影子把地图还给了他们

options.en: They followed the camels on their own
options.zh: 他们自己跟着骆驼走

explain.en: Benjamin had drawn the route from memory; when Tagik and Helela saw his drawing they said they could take the family there.
explain.zh: 本杰明凭记忆画出了路线。塔吉克和赫莱拉看到他的画后，说他们可以带这家人去那里。

q.en: What gift did the Mongolian tribal chief give Geronimo's family at the end?
q.zh: 故事结尾，蒙古部落首领送给杰罗尼摩一家什么礼物？

options.en: Stone pendants of blue amber with a fossilized insect inside
options.zh: 内含化石昆虫的蓝色琥珀石吊坠
一袋袋金币
一匹活的普氏野马

options.en: A piece of the Tarbosaurus skeleton
options.zh: 一块特暴龙的骨架

explain.en: The chief gave each of them a stone pendant that was actually a fragment of precious blue amber containing a fossilized insect.
explain.zh: 首领送给每人一枚石吊坠，那其实是一块珍贵的蓝色琥珀碎片，里面封着一只化石昆虫。
